stories.title: Series Preview — Cubs at Mets, Game 1 of 4 (Citi Field)
stories.angle: Cubs open a 4-game road series at Citi Field; 6:10 PM CT first pitch; Cubs 40-37 vs. Mets 34-43; Cubs swept Mets 3-0 in April; Imanaga vs. Senga

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs open a 4-game road series at Citi Field tonight. Game 1, 6:10 PM CT.

Chicago (40-37) vs. New York (34-43). The Cubs are 3-0 against the Mets this season — they swept them in April.

Imanaga starts tonight.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Senga's 9.00 ERA Is a Cubs Opportunity
stories.angle: Bold take — Senga is arguably the most hittable starter in the NL right now; Cubs are 3-0 vs. Mets this year; this is the time to extend that

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Kodai Senga is starting Game 1 for the Mets tonight.

His 2026 line: 0-5, 9.00 ERA. Just returned from the IL. That's not a typo.

The Cubs are 3-0 against the Mets this year. Tonight's the chance to make it 4.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: Justin Steele Starts Throwing Program Today
stories.angle: Informative/urgent — milestone in Steele's recovery, but still 6+ weeks from MLB return; best case September; rotation desperately needs help in the meantime

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Justin Steele officially starts his throwing program today.

He's still weeks from facing hitters and needs a full build-up to return. Best case: September.

This rotation needs help. The deadline is 42 days away.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 41 Days, 27th in ERA
stories.angle: Bold — Cubs 27th in ERA (4.71), 9 on IL, Horton and Hodge done for year, Steele just starting to throw; 41 days to August 3; Jed Hoyer must act

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Cubs starters: 27th in ERA (4.71) this season.

Nine pitchers on the IL. Horton and Hodge are done for the year. Steele just started his throwing program.

Jed Hoyer has 42 days to fix this rotation. The clock is loud.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Smokies Locked in First-Half Southern League Title Race
stories.angle: Prospect feature — Knoxville in first place in SL North with first half winding down; No. 10 prospect Owen Ayers and Jefferson Rojas leading the charge

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Knoxville Smokies are locked in a first-half title race in the Southern League North.

No. 10 prospect Owen Ayers and Jefferson Rojas are leading this charge.

The Cubs' farm system is quietly building something real.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Wild Card Contender Must-Win Series
stories.angle: Game 1 of 4 tonight; wild card framing — 4 games against a 34-43 team is exactly the kind of series a contender has to dominate; Imanaga on the mound

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Game 1 of a 4-game road series at Citi Field — 6:10 PM CT first pitch.

Cubs (40-37) vs. Mets (34-43). Four games against a team with a losing record. This is exactly the kind of series a wild card contender has to win.

Imanaga. Let's work.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
